title: eclipta prostrata var. undulata
intro: Eclipta prostrata var. undulata, also known as false daisy or yerba de tago, is a perennial herb native to Asia and North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a hair growth promoter and to support liver and kidney function, due to its potential to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Eclipta prostrata var. undulata include its ability to promote hair growth, improve liver and kidney function, and enhance cognitive function. Eclipta prostrata var. undulata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and topical creams, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
